issues.display_title: Issue #431: [include] Support include param on Timeline Recent API
issues.main_description_html:
RESULT 18/06/26

✅ Implementation Complete — Ready for Unit Testing

Route :

GET /posts/timeline-recent

New Param :

  • include

Allowed include :
category_id, created_at, animation, description, slug, animation_filter, little_planet, little_planet_filter, location_post, location_name, panorama, thumbnail, panorama_preview, post_type, panorama_quality, pending, avatar, fullname, username, potd, broadcast_data

Example Implementation :

GET /posts/timeline-recent?limit=2&page=1&include=panorama_preview,slug,description,post_type

Summary

Add include parameter support to the Timeline Recent API.

  • Endpoint: GET /v1/posts/recent
  • File: src/Action/V1/Posts/TimeLinePostRecent.go
  • Whitelisted fields: category_id, created_at, animation, description, slug, animation_filter, little_planet, little_planet_filter, location_post, location_name, panorama, thumbnail, panorama_preview, post_type, panorama_quality, pending, avatar, fullname, username, potd, broadcast_data
  • Internal dependency: slug is always included in the SQL selection to support ElasticSearch post-count lookups.

🧪 Testing Scenario (for tester)

  • No include: default feed fields returned (backward compatible).
  • Subset: include=thumbnail,post_type → each item returns only those (internal slug handling preserved).
  • ElasticSearch counters: confirm post/like/comment counts still resolve even when slug is NOT in include.
  • id excluded from every item.
  • Pagination: verify include works across paginated pages.
  • Invalid field: ignored gracefully.

Source: docs/brainstorm/CHANGELOG_INCLUDE_PARAM.md · Priority: Medium · Depends on GetValidIncludes utility.

issues.display_title: Issue #435: [include] Support include param on List Comments API
issues.main_description_html:
RESULT 18/06/26

✅ Implementation Complete — Ready for Unit Testing

Route :

GET /comments/:slugPost

New Param :

  • include

Allowed include :
slug, parent_slug, comment_value, created_at, username, fullname, avatar, users_liked

Example Implementation :

GET /comments/c0d4c02c1c2-2025120201502500?limit=30&page=1&include=comment_value,slug,username

Summary

Add include parameter support to the List Comments API.

  • Endpoint: GET /v1/comments/list/:sid
  • File: src/Action/V1/Comments/ListComments.go
  • Whitelisted fields: slug, parent_slug, comment_value, created_at, username, fullname, avatar, users_liked
  • Internal dependency: slug is always included in the SQL selection to fetch reply and like counts from ElasticSearch.

🧪 Testing Scenario (for tester)

  • No include: default comment fields returned (backward compatible).
  • Subset: include=comment_value,username → only those returned per comment.
  • Reply/like counts: confirm reply counts and like counts still resolve when slug omitted from include.
  • Nested replies: verify parent_slug threading still works when included/excluded.
  • id excluded from every comment.
  • Invalid field: ignored gracefully.

Source: docs/brainstorm/CHANGELOG_INCLUDE_PARAM.md · Priority: Low · Depends on GetValidIncludes utility.

issues.display_title: Issue #436: Update: Lat/Lng for Suggest APIs
issues.main_description_html:
RESULT 18/06/26

✅ Implementation Complete — Ready for Unit Testing

Imlementation API Place Suggest :

Implementation API Place Detail Post :

Overview

Add lat and lng coordinates to the response of the Suggest (Autocomplete) endpoints to provide more geographical context to the client.

Endpoints Affected

  1. /places/suggest
  2. /places/detail/posts/suggest/:location_group_slug

Changes

1. Models Update — src/Models/PlacesModel.go

  • PlaceSuggestItem: Added Latitude (lat) and Longitude (lng).
  • PlaceDetailPostSuggestItem: Added Latitude (lat) and Longitude (lng).

2. Action Update — src/Action/V1/Places/GetPlaceSuggest.go

  • Updated query to select MAX(location_post->>'latitude') AS latitude and MAX(location_post->>'longitude') AS longitude.
  • Maintained grouping by location_group and location_group_slug.

3. Action Update — src/Action/V1/Places/PlaceDetailPostsSuggest.go

  • Updated query to select MAX(latitude) as latitude and MAX(longitude) as longitude.
  • Grouped by location_name to ensure unique suggestions while fetching coordinates.

Verification

  • Compilation Check: go build ./... passed.
  • Schema Alignment: Fields correctly mapped to database columns/JSONB paths.
  • Response Format: Verified JSON tags are lat and lng.

Source: docs/task/2026-06-18-update-lat-lng-suggest.md
